actionCalls.description: Calls an action that creates a quote.
actionCalls.name: InvokePlaceSalesTransactionApi
actionCalls.label: Invoke Place Sales Transaction API

assignments.description: Handle the runtime exception while calling the Place Sales Transaction invocable action.
assignments.name: ErrorMessageAssignment
assignments.label: Error Message Assignment

assignments.description: Set the error message from the Place Sales Transaction invocable action.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessage
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the values for the Graph Apex-defined type as an input to the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action
assignments.name: SetGraphInput
assignments.label: Set Graph Input

assignments.description: Sets the QuoteCount variable based on the count of related quotes in the Get Quotes Related to Opportunity record collection variable and adds 1 for the quote that this flow creates. For example, if an opportunity has 10 existing quotes, this element adds the quote the flow creates and sets the QuoteCount to 11. The flow uses QuoteCount in the QuoteNameFormula.
assignments.name: SetQuoteCount
assignments.label: Set Quote Count

assignments.description: Sets the fields on the quote by populating the record map wrappers. This element is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
assignments.name: SetQuoteFields
assignments.label: Set Quote Fields

assignments.description: Sets the QuoteRecordReference variables that are used within the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
assignments.name: SetQuoteRecordReferenceValues
assignments.label: Set Quote Record Reference Values

decisions.description: Handle the output from Place Sales Transaction.
decisions.name: Result
decisions.label: Result

formulas.description: Calculates a quote name that includes the number of quotes and the opportunity name
formulas.name: QuoteNameFormula

recordLookups.description: Gets the opportunity record with an ID that matches the opportunityId passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Opportunity from Get Opportunity record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetOpportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity

recordLookups.description: Gets the ID of the price book record with a name that matches the priceBookName passed into the flow. Stores the ID of the result in the Price Book from Get Price Book ID record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetPriceBookId
recordLookups.label: Get Price Book Id

recordLookups.description: Gets all quotes with an opportunity ID that matches the ID in the Opportunity from Get Opportunity record variable. Stores the results in the Quotes from Get Quotes Related to Opportunity record collection variable.
recordLookups.name: GetQuotesRelatedToOpportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Quotes Related to Opportunity

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Bill To City (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToCityRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Bill To Country (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToCountryRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Bill To Postal Code (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToPostalCodeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Bill To State (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToStateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Bill To Street (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToStreetRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Commercial Action (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: commercialActionRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Contains Partner Subscription? (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: containspartnersubscriptionsRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote. Automatically Renew (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: doesautomaticallyrenewRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Provides an error message if applicable.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: An apex defined type that contains a list of errors with errorMessage, referenceId, and errorCode
variables.name: errorResponse

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Hardware Order (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: hardwareorderRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Indicates success or failure.
variables.name: isSuccess

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Legacy Record (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: legacyRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Next Renewal Date (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: nextrenewaldateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote. One Time Total (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: oneTimeTotalRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: The ID of the opportunity record that’s passed into the flow.
variables.name: opportunityID

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Opportunity field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: opportunityRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets values for the Graph Apex-defined type that’s used as an input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: placeSalesTransactionGraph

variables.description: Stores the name of the pricebook that’s assigned to the quote and passed into the flow.
variables.name: priceBookName

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Pricebook2Id field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: pricebookNameRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the count of the quotes on the opportunity that the flow creates.
variables.name: quoteCount

variables.description: Stores the 18-character ID for the quote record that this flow modifies.
variables.name: quoteId

variables.description: Stores the name of the quote passed into the flow. If no value is provided, defaults to the QuoteNameFormula.
variables.name: quoteName

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Name field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoteNameRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record reference for the quote that this flow modifies. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoteRecordReference

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Status (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoteStatusRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Recurring Total (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: recurringtotalRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Renewal Date (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: renewaldateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Sales Transaction (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: salesTransactionTypeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Ship To City (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToCityRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Ship To Country (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToCountryRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Ship To Postal Code (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToPostalCodeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Ship To State (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToStateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Ship To Street (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToStreetRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total ARR(key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total Delta ARR (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totaldeltaARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total MRR (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalMRRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total Renewal ARR(key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalrenewalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Sets the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total Up For Renewal ARR(key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalupforrrenewalARRRecordMapWrapper
